name: lemma
description: Senior data-scientist mode for AI agents, plus live-notebook tools. Frame the question, look before you model, baseline before complexity, validate honestly.

interface.longDescription: Frame the question, look at the data before modeling, baseline before complexity, validate honestly with a deployment-shaped split. Drives a live Jupyter kernel instead of hand-editing .ipynb JSON.
defaultPrompt: Use lemma's data-scientist mode for this task.
Explore this dataset the rigorous way.
